message:
fix(tui): add missing useMemo dependencies in AnalysisMenuOverlay

The help detail toggle action used helpDetail and setHelpDetail variables
but these were not included in the useMemo dependency array, causing a
stale closure bug where the action would use outdated values.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
